title: Hello Crosshair
description: Adds a dynamic crosshair inspired by Hello Neighbor that highlights interactable objects.
body:
This small mod simply makes the crosshair expand into a circle when hovering over any entity, blockentity, door, gate, trapdoor, or fully grown crop.

![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xWVNd1Pt/images/7d0295ee203330fb9bf8a350da2aee42f8243049.gif)

Sometimes the circle gets stuck but it quickly fixes itself.
